title: Double Time Challenge
description: 10-minute EMOM with wide push-ups and sumo squats followed by a complete 8-minute AMRAP

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Brisk march in place
exercises.instructions: Walk quickly in place with arm swings

exercises.name: Hip 90/90
exercises.instructions: Seated, legs at 90 degrees, twist side to side

exercises.name: Moderate high knees
exercises.instructions: Knees to chest at a moderate pace

exercises.name: Wide push-ups
exercises.instructions: Hands wider than the shoulders, chest focus

exercises.name: Sumo squats
exercises.instructions: Feet very wide, toes pointed out

exercises.name: Toe touches
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, legs vertical, reach hands to feet

exercises.name: Reverse lunges
exercises.instructions: Big step backward, lower the knee

exercises.name: Standard push-ups
exercises.instructions: Hands shoulder-width apart, body braced, lower chest to the floor

exercises.name: Bicycle crunches
exercises.instructions: Elbow to opposite knee alternating, leg extended

exercises.name: Psoas stretch
exercises.instructions: Low lunge, drive the hip forward

exercises.name: Standing quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Grab your foot behind you, knee toward the floor

exercises.name: Scorpion stretch
exercises.instructions: Lying face down, bring the foot to the opposite hand, twisting

exercises.name: Cat-cow
exercises.instructions: On all fours, alternate cat and cow, breathe

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s through the nose, hold 4s, exhale 6s through the mouth
